title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on mass tourism and its consequences.

questions.question: Do you think tourism causes more harm than good to local communities and the environment?
Should governments limit the number of tourists visiting popular destinations?
Some people say that travelling abroad gives you a much better understanding of the world than simply reading about it. Do you agree?

script.text: Do you think tourism causes more harm than good to local communities and the environment?
Should governments limit the number of tourists visiting popular destinations?
Some people say that travelling abroad gives you a much better understanding of the world than simply reading about it. Do you agree?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
